---
name: "🐛 Bug Report"
about: Something isn't working as expected
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: quantum-weaver
---

## 🐛 Describe the Bug

A clear and simple description of what's not working.

---

## 🔍 Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

---

## ✅ What Should Happen

A clear description of what you expected to happen.

---

## 📸 Screenshots (if helpful)

If applicable, add screenshots to show the problem.

---

## 🧠 Your Context (Optional but Helpful)

This helps us understand different neurotypes and needs:

- [ ] I'm neurodivergent and this issue affects me specifically
- [ ] This happens with dark mode / light mode
- [ ] This happens with reduced motion settings
- [ ] This is sensory-related (flashing, sound, etc.)

---

## 💻 Environment (if technical)

- OS: [e.g., Windows, Mac, Linux]
- Browser: [e.g., Chrome, Safari, Firefox]
- Version: [e.g., 22]

---

## 📝 Additional Context

Anything else you think might help?

---

*Thank you for helping make the sanctuary better for everyone.* 🏛️✨
